title: FAR Part 21 Type Certification
description: Obtain FAA type certificate per FAR Part 21 for new aircraft.

title: FAR Part 25 Transport Category
description: Meet FAR Part 25 airworthiness for transport-category aircraft.

title: FAR Part 23 Normal Category
description: Meet FAR Part 23 airworthiness for small aircraft.

title: FAR Part 27 Normal Rotorcraft
description: Meet FAR Part 27 airworthiness for normal rotorcraft.

title: FAR Part 33 Aircraft Engines
description: Meet FAR Part 33 airworthiness for aircraft engines.

title: FAR Part 145 Repair Station
description: Maintain FAA Part 145 repair station certification.

title: FAR Part 43 Maintenance Standards
description: Apply FAR Part 43 maintenance, preventive maintenance, rebuilding standards.

title: EASA Part 21 DOA/POA
description: Maintain EASA Part 21 Design and Production Organisation Approvals.

title: EASA Part 145 Maintenance
description: Maintain EASA Part 145 maintenance organisation approval.

title: EASA Part 66 Engineering Licensing
description: Use Part 66-licensed engineers for certifying release to service.

title: AS9100 Aerospace QMS
description: Maintain AS9100D QMS certification for aerospace manufacturing.

title: AS9110 Aerospace MRO
description: Maintain AS9110 QMS certification for aerospace MRO operations.

title: AS9120 Aerospace Distribution
description: Maintain AS9120 QMS certification for aerospace parts distributors.

title: NADCAP Special Process Accreditation
description: Maintain NADCAP accreditation for aerospace special processes (heat treat, NDT, welding).

title: ITAR for Defense Articles
description: Apply ITAR to defense aerospace articles and services.

title: DDTC Registration
description: Register with State Department DDTC before manufacturing or exporting defense articles.

title: Deemed Export Compliance
description: Apply ITAR deemed export rules to foreign nationals accessing controlled tech.

title: EAR Dual-Use Aerospace Tech
description: Apply EAR Export Administration Regulations to dual-use aerospace technology.

title: USML Category VIII Aircraft
description: Apply USML Category VIII to military aircraft and propulsion systems.

title: OFAC Customer Screening
description: Screen aerospace customers and end-users against OFAC SDN list.

title: DFARS for DoD Aerospace Contractors
description: Apply DFARS 252.204-7012 cybersecurity for DoD aerospace contractor CUI.

title: CMMC Level 2/3 Certification
description: Maintain CMMC Level 2/3 for DoD aerospace contracts.

title: NIST 800-171 CUI Protection
description: Apply 110 controls of NIST SP 800-171 to systems handling CUI.

title: ICAO Annex 1 Personnel Licensing
description: Apply ICAO Annex 1 standards for personnel licensing internationally.

title: ICAO Annex 6 Aircraft Operations
description: Apply ICAO Annex 6 standards for international aircraft operations.

title: ICAO Annex 8 Airworthiness
description: Apply ICAO Annex 8 international airworthiness standards.

title: ICAO Annex 16 Environmental Protection
description: Apply ICAO Annex 16 noise and emissions standards.

title: ICAO Annex 17 Aviation Security
description: Apply ICAO Annex 17 international aviation security standards.

title: TSA Aviation Security Programs
description: Comply with TSA aviation security programs for indirect carriers.

title: Airworthiness Directives Compliance
description: Comply with all applicable Airworthiness Directives by deadline.

title: Service Bulletin Tracking
description: Track and apply OEM service bulletins per maintenance program.

title: Minimum Equipment List
description: Apply approved Minimum Equipment List for dispatch eligibility.

title: DO-178C Software Certification
description: Apply DO-178C to airborne software at DAL A-D.

title: DO-254 Hardware Certification
description: Apply DO-254 to airborne electronic hardware at DAL A-D.

title: ARP 4754A System Development
description: Apply ARP 4754A for system development assurance.

title: ARP 4761 Safety Assessment
description: Apply ARP 4761 for safety assessment process (FHA, PSSA, SSA).

title: DO-160G Environmental Conditions
description: Apply DO-160G environmental conditions and test procedures.

title: DO-326A Airworthiness Security
description: Apply DO-326A airworthiness security process specification.

title: AS5553 Counterfeit Parts Prevention
description: Apply AS5553 standard to prevent counterfeit electronic parts in aerospace.

title: AS6174 Counterfeit Materiel
description: Apply AS6174 to prevent counterfeit materiel.

title: AS9145 APQP/PPAP for Aerospace
description: Apply AS9145 advanced product quality planning for aerospace.

title: AS9146 FOD Prevention Program
description: Apply AS9146 Foreign Object Damage prevention program standards.

title: AS9162 Aerospace Human Factors
description: Apply AS9162 human factors training for aerospace.

title: OSHA General Industry
description: Apply OSHA general industry standards to aerospace manufacturing.

title: Hexavalent Chromium Exposure
description: Limit hexavalent chromium exposure in aerospace plating per OSHA.

title: Beryllium Exposure Standard
description: Limit beryllium exposure in aerospace per OSHA general industry standard.

title: Clean Air Act Permits
description: Obtain Title V and NSR permits for aerospace facility emissions.

title: RCRA Hazardous Waste
description: Manage aerospace hazardous waste from cradle to grave per RCRA.

title: REACH for Aerospace Components
description: Comply with REACH for substances in EU-sold aerospace components.

title: RoHS for Aerospace Electronics
description: Apply RoHS to commercial aerospace electronics where applicable (defense exemptions).

title: Conflict Minerals Reporting
description: Report 3TG conflict minerals per Dodd-Frank Section 1502.

title: UFLPA Forced Labor Verification
description: Verify aerospace supply chain does not include Xinjiang-produced goods.

title: FCPA Anti-Bribery
description: Avoid corrupt payments in international aerospace sales.

title: UK Bribery Act
description: Maintain adequate procedures to prevent bribery per Section 7.

title: Lawful Basis for Customer Data
description: Document lawful basis for aerospace customer personal data processing.

title: 72-Hour Breach Notification
description: Notify supervisory authority of personal data breach within 72 hours.

title: Cross-Border Aerospace Data Transfers
description: Use SCCs or adequacy decisions for aerospace data transfers outside EEA.

title: Security Trust Services Criteria
description: Implement controls aligned with AICPA TSC for security.

title: Aerospace ISMS
description: Establish ISMS for aerospace design / manufacturing / IP systems.

title: Aerospace IP Encryption
description: Apply encryption to aerospace design IP and trade secrets.

title: Type Inspection Authorization
description: Obtain Type Inspection Authorization (TIA) per FAA Order 8110.4C.

title: Master Minimum Equipment List
description: Develop MMEL per FAA Policy Letter 25.

title: Continuing Analysis and Surveillance
description: Maintain CASS program per FAR 121.373 for air carriers.

title: EASA Part M / Part CAMO
description: Maintain Part CAMO approval for continuing airworthiness management.

title: PANS-OPS Procedures
description: Apply ICAO PANS-OPS for aircraft instrument procedures.

title: EU Airport Slot Regulation
description: Comply with EU airport slot allocation Regulation 95/93.

title: EU ETS for Aviation
description: Comply with EU Emissions Trading System for aviation.

title: ICAO CORSIA Compliance
description: Comply with ICAO Carbon Offsetting and Reduction Scheme for International Aviation.

title: Sustainable Aviation Fuel
description: Track SAF blending and use per FAA / ICAO requirements.

title: Bird Strike Reporting
description: Report bird and wildlife strikes to FAA / ICAO.

title: FAR Part 107 Commercial UAS
description: Comply with FAR Part 107 for commercial small UAS operations.

title: EU UAS Regulation
description: Comply with EU UAS Regulation 2019/947 for unmanned aircraft.

title: Drone Remote ID Compliance
description: Comply with FAA Remote ID rule for UAS broadcast identification.

title: FAA Powered-Lift Special Class
description: Apply FAA powered-lift special class certification for eVTOL.

title: FAA Part 450 Commercial Space
description: Comply with FAR Part 450 for commercial space launch and reentry.

title: FCC Space Stations Licensing
description: Obtain FCC Part 25 licensing for commercial satellites.

title: ITU Spectrum Coordination
description: Coordinate satellite spectrum per ITU Radio Regulations.

title: Orbital Debris Mitigation
description: Apply NASA NPR 8715.6 / IADC orbital debris mitigation guidelines.

title: Aviation Maintenance OSHA
description: Apply OSHA maintenance safety standards including hot work and confined space.

title: Dangerous Goods Acceptance
description: Apply IATA DGR for dangerous goods acceptance in aviation.

title: FAA Aeromedical Certification
description: Comply with FAA medical certification per FAR Part 67 for crew.

title: EU AI Act for Aviation AI
description: Apply EU AI Act high-risk classification to aviation AI safety systems.

title: Aerospace Cyber Insurance
description: Maintain cyber insurance covering aviation IP and OT environments.

title: Modern Slavery Statement
description: Publish annual modern slavery statement for UK aerospace operations.

title: TCFD Climate Disclosure
description: Disclose climate-related risks per TCFD framework.

title: Aerospace Business Continuity
description: Establish BCMS per ISO 22301 for aerospace operations.

title: FAR Part 91 General Operating Rules
description: Comply with FAR Part 91 general operating and flight rules.

title: FAR Part 121 Scheduled Air Carrier
description: Comply with FAR Part 121 for scheduled air carrier operations.

title: FAR Part 135 On-Demand Charter
description: Comply with FAR Part 135 for on-demand and commuter operations.

title: AOG Response Procedures
description: Maintain AOG (Aircraft on Ground) response procedures.

title: FAA PMA Parts
description: Obtain Parts Manufacturer Approval per FAR 21.303.

title: FAA TSO Authorization
description: Obtain Technical Standard Order Authorization per FAR 21 Subpart O.

title: FAA STC Supplemental Type Certificate
description: Obtain STC for major design changes per FAR 21 Subpart E.

title: FAA MIDO Oversight
description: Maintain compliance with FAA Manufacturing Inspection District Office oversight.

title: Designated Engineering Representative
description: Use DER per FAR 183 for design approval certifications.

title: EASA CS-23 Small Aircraft
description: Meet EASA CS-23 certification specifications for small aircraft.

title: EASA CS-25 Large Aeroplanes
description: Meet EASA CS-25 certification specifications for large aeroplanes.

title: FAA Drug and Alcohol Testing
description: Apply FAA drug and alcohol testing per FAR 120 for safety-sensitive employees.

title: ATA Spec 100 / iSpec 2200
description: Use ATA Spec 100 / iSpec 2200 for technical documentation.

title: S1000D Technical Publications
description: Apply S1000D international specification for technical publications.
